iterate_latest.summary: SmartViewer inline video via a new Range-capable GET /api/external/projects/:id/media route (206/200/416, video MIME allowlist 415, no size cap, fs.createReadStream — separate from the atomic /file route). Client VideoRenderer mirrors ImageRenderer (<video src=mediaUrl(...)> + onError chip); resolveKind maps mp4/m4v/webm/ogv/ogg/mov. server tsc 0 + 1450/1450 vitest; client tsc 0 + oxlint clean + 1436/1436 vitest; F0.5 web E2E 4/4 against an isolated single-process stack (real node-server adapter 206 byte-exact + real Chromium consumer chain).

surface_verification.note: Isolated single-process stack (temp USERPROFILE, PORT=3863, SHIPWRIGHT_STATIC_DIR=built SPA, SHIPWRIGHT_NETWORK_PROFILE=local) seeded with a project containing a 100-byte ramp clip.mp4. Verified on the REAL @hono/node-server adapter: Range bytes=10-19 -> 206 byte-exact slice; full GET -> 200 + Accept-Ranges + video/mp4; non-video -> 415; real Chromium /preview consumer chain fetched /media (200/206) and mounted VideoRenderer.

degraded.condition: External LLM review skipped: no OPENROUTER_API_KEY / GEMINI_API_KEY / OPENAI_API_KEY in the non-interactive shell env. External review is Advisory per the iterate Override Classes; a self-driven adversarial diff pass was performed instead, and the user was offered to run external_review.py --mode code with a key before merge.

behaviors.behavior: GET /media no-Range -> 200 full body + Accept-Ranges + video MIME
GET /media Range -> 206 byte-exact slice (a-b, open-ended, suffix, over-long clamp)
behaviors.evidence: media-route.test AC2 x4 + F0.5 real-server 206 byte-exact PASSED

behaviors.behavior: SmartViewer dispatches video -> VideoRenderer, issues no JS fetch
behaviors.evidence: SmartViewer.test 'video extension' (fetch mock not called) PASSED

behaviors.behavior: VideoRenderer renders <video src=mediaUrl> + onError fallback chip
Real-browser consumer chain fetches /media (200/206) and mounts VideoRenderer
behaviors.evidence: F0.5 'browser: SmartViewer mounts VideoRenderer and fetches /media' PASSED

behaviors.behavior: Actual codec decode / pixel playback in <video>
behaviors.evidence: We serve container bytes as-is; decode is browser/codec-dependent. An undecodable codec is handled via the onError chip (tested). Real playback needs a real clip + visual confirmation.

test_completeness.enumeration_basis: Server /media HTTP contract (status matrix 200/206/416/415/404/400 + byte-exact Range arithmetic) + client resolveKind/SmartViewer dispatch + VideoRenderer render/onError + F0.5 real-stack consumer chain. Covers AC1-AC6; AC7 (FolderTree video icon) descoped with no shipped behavior. Codec decode is the sole untestable row (requires-manual-visual-judgment).
